questions-page.title: Help Center: Everything About Bus Tickets Online
questions-page.search_for_topic_or_question: Search for a topic or question
questions-page.no_results_found: No results found for the query

concession_tickets.title: Are there concession (discounted) bus tickets?
concession_tickets.text_1: No. GreenBus currently does not apply concession-document discounts — tickets are sold at the carrier’s fare. We are working on adding concessions and will announce them in our newsletter and blog.

border_crossing.title: How long does crossing the border by bus take?
border_crossing.text_1: Border-crossing time is already included in the total trip duration shown on the website and on your ticket. Border and customs control on international routes usually takes 1–3 hours depending on the checkpoint and traffic. GreenBus and the carrier cannot speed up control — it is regulated by government authorities.
border_crossing.text_2: Prepare your documents in advance. Check requirements and timings with the customs service of the destination country, and see route details on the relevant route page.

can_send_parcel.title: Can I send a parcel by bus through GreenBus?
can_send_parcel.text_1: No. GreenBus does not offer parcel shipping and is not responsible for personal arrangements with the carrier. The service only sells passenger bus tickets.

can_skip_printing.title: Do I need to print my bus ticket?
can_skip_printing.text_1: In most cases — yes: a printed ticket is required to board. The exception is routes marked “printing not required”, where you may show the e-ticket on your phone screen.
can_skip_printing.text_2: If a route has no such mark, you must print the ticket — otherwise the carrier may refuse boarding. The e-ticket is emailed to you right after payment.

how_to_book.title: How do I book a bus ticket online?
how_to_book.text_1: To book a ticket on GreenBus: 1) find a trip in the search form for your route; 2) fill in and check passenger details; 3) review the refund terms and public offer; 4) enter a phone number to access your Personal Account; 5) enter an email to receive the tickets; 6) click “Pay” and choose a payment method.
how_to_book.text_2: Each booking has a payment deadline: if it is not paid in time, it is cancelled automatically. Tickets are issued and valid only after payment.

free_seating_how_to_choose.title: What is free seating and how do I choose a seat?
free_seating_how_to_choose.text_1: Free seating means the carrier does not assign a specific seat — it is set by the dispatcher at boarding. To get a comfortable seat, arrive early for boarding.
free_seating_how_to_choose.text_2: If the carrier allows seat selection, click “Seat selection” during checkout to open the bus layout with available seats.

international_flights.title: How do I buy a ticket for an international bus route from Ukraine?
international_flights.text_1: Find your trip in the search form on the homepage, or pick a destination among the popular routes — to Poland, Germany, Czechia and other European countries.
international_flights.text_2: Before buying, check the border-crossing requirements along your route and prepare your documents. See more in the answer about crossing the border.

payment_and_receiving.title: How do I pay for a ticket and where do I get it?
payment_and_receiving.text_1: You can pay right after booking with any Visa or MasterCard, or another method offered on the site. There is no booking fee.
payment_and_receiving.text_2: After payment, tickets are sent automatically to the email you provided and are available in your Personal Account.

available_discounts.title: What discounts, promotions and promo codes are available?
available_discounts.text_1: We announce discounts and promotions in our email newsletter and in the blog. Most promotions are available only to subscribers, so we recommend subscribing.

how_to_leave_review.title: How do I leave a review about the trip and the carrier?
how_to_leave_review.text_1: After your trip, a trip-evaluation survey is sent to the email you provided at booking.
how_to_leave_review.text_2: There you can rate the carrier and leave a review. Reviews form the carrier’s rating on the site, helping other passengers choose the most reliable one.

available_flights_schedule.title: How can I see the bus schedule and available trips?
available_flights_schedule.text_1: Open the search form on the homepage: enter the departure and arrival points, date and number of passengers, then click “Find ticket”.
available_flights_schedule.text_2: You will see trips for the route with prices and carrier ratings. If no seats are available on your date, try nearby dates or pick a destination among the popular routes.

flight_confirmation.title: Is the trip guaranteed to run?
flight_confirmation.text_1: GreenBus receives all changes from the carrier, so cancellation for reasons beyond our control cannot be ruled out.
flight_confirmation.text_2: As soon as the carrier notifies us of any changes, we will contact you via the phone number from your order.
flight_confirmation.text_3: You can check the bus number and trip details via the carrier’s contact number shown on your ticket.

ticket_purchase_advance.title: How far in advance should I buy a bus ticket?
ticket_purchase_advance.text_1: Carriers usually open sales for regular routes about a month ahead. It is better to buy early — on popular routes seats and the “from” price sell out faster.

calculate_travel_time.title: How do I find the travel time and arrival time?
calculate_travel_time.text_1: The estimated travel time, stops and arrival time are shown on the site in the trip schedule and on your ticket.
calculate_travel_time.text_2: Allow a buffer: do not plan a transfer in under 2 hours for domestic trips, or under 8 hours for international ones.

bus_type.title: What kind of bus will it be and what amenities are there?
bus_type.text_1: The bus model, services and amenities provided by the carrier are shown on the site when you buy a ticket.
bus_type.text_2: After purchase, your ticket includes the carrier’s contact number to check further details.

travel_with_pets.title: Can I travel by bus with a pet?
travel_with_pets.text_1: Pet rules are set by the carrier, so check them in advance. Usually you need a veterinary passport with vaccinations, a health certificate and a carrier bag.
travel_with_pets.text_2: The carrier may regulate pet transport on its trips — confirm the conditions individually via the contacts on your ticket.

luggage_transportation.title: What are the bus luggage rules?
luggage_transportation.text_1: Baggage and hand-luggage limits are set by the carrier. They may refuse luggage that blocks the aisle or does not meet the trip’s rules.
luggage_transportation.text_2: Check the luggage conditions for a specific trip with the carrier via the contacts on your ticket.

route_and_stops.title: Where can I see the route and stops?
route_and_stops.text_1: The full route and stops are listed in the trip schedule — provided and regulated solely by the carrier. Compare destinations in the routes section.

if_no_route_found.title: What if I can’t find the trip I need?
if_no_route_found.text_1: The site shows all current trips with available seats for your date. If there is none, try another date or a destination among the popular routes. We keep adding new routes and carriers.

what_you_need_for_boarding.title: What do I need to board the bus?
what_you_need_for_boarding.text_1: To board you need a passport and a ticket — printed or electronic (see the answer about printing the ticket).
what_you_need_for_boarding.text_2: The details on your passport and ticket must match exactly. If they differ or a document is missing, the carrier may refuse boarding.

how_early_to_arrive_before_flight.title: How early should I arrive before departure?
how_early_to_arrive_before_flight.text_1: First check your ticket: sometimes the carrier states a mandatory arrival and check-in time for boarding.
how_early_to_arrive_before_flight.text_2: If there is no such requirement, arrive at the departure point at least an hour before the trip.

exact_departure_address_how_to_find_the_.title: How do I find the exact departure address and the bus?
exact_departure_address_how_to_find_the_.text_1: The exact departure address from the carrier is shown on the site in the trip schedule and on your ticket.
exact_departure_address_how_to_find_the_.text_2: For extra landmarks or geolocation, contact the carrier via the number on your ticket.

departure_and_arrival_time.title: Which time zone are departure and arrival shown in?
departure_and_arrival_time.text_1: The ticket always shows the local time of each point. For example, on a Warsaw–Minsk trip, departure is in Polish time and arrival in Minsk time.
departure_and_arrival_time.text_2: Mind the time-zone difference, especially if your trip involves transfers.

what_to_do_if_passenger_details_are_inco.title: What if the passenger details on the ticket are wrong?
what_to_do_if_passenger_details_are_inco.text_1: Passenger details on a ticket cannot be edited — check them carefully before paying. If you find an error, request a refund and rebook.
what_to_do_if_passenger_details_are_inco.text_2: Before requesting a refund, review the voluntary refund terms of your ticket.
what_to_do_if_passenger_details_are_inco.text_3: With errors or typos on the ticket, the carrier may refuse boarding, so successful boarding cannot be guaranteed.

how_to_process_refund.title: How do I request a ticket refund?
how_to_process_refund.text_1: You can request a refund in two ways:
how_to_process_refund.text_2: Option 1 — via your Personal Account: open the section, select the ticket, click “Return ticket”, give a reason and confirm.
how_to_process_refund.text_3: Option 2 — if you cannot log in to your Personal Account, use the link in the ticket email sent to you and request the refund there.

how_to_know_return_terms_and_conditions.title: How do I find the refund terms and timelines?
how_to_know_return_terms_and_conditions.text_1: The refund amount depends on the carrier’s terms and the time left before departure.
how_to_know_return_terms_and_conditions.text_2: Refund terms are public before booking: shown on the site and duplicated at the bottom of the ticket.
how_to_know_return_terms_and_conditions.text_3: We process requests within 1–10 days; you can track the status in your Personal Account.

can_i_change_flight_date_or_time.title: Can I change the trip date or time after payment?
can_i_change_flight_date_or_time.text_1: No, you cannot change the date, time or seats after payment.
can_i_change_flight_date_or_time.text_2: In most cases you can request a refund before departure and buy new tickets for another time or date.
can_i_change_flight_date_or_time.text_3: Before refunding, check the carrier’s terms shown on your ticket.

what_to_do_if_you_missed_the_flight.title: What should I do if I missed the bus?
what_to_do_if_you_missed_the_flight.text_1: If you missed the trip, check the refund terms on your ticket.
what_to_do_if_you_missed_the_flight.text_2: Some carriers allow returning the ticket after departure and refund part of its cost.
what_to_do_if_you_missed_the_flight.text_3: If available, request a refund following the “How to request a refund” guide.

what_to_do_if_my_flight_is_cancelled_or_.title: What if my trip is cancelled or the bus didn’t arrive?
what_to_do_if_my_flight_is_cancelled_or_.text_1: If the carrier cancels the trip, you will receive an SMS in advance to the phone number from your order.
what_to_do_if_my_flight_is_cancelled_or_.text_2: Enter a correct phone number so we can warn you about changes and confirm payment.
what_to_do_if_my_flight_is_cancelled_or_.text_3: If the bus is not there, contact the carrier via the details on your ticket: the platform may have changed or the bus may not be ready yet.
what_to_do_if_my_flight_is_cancelled_or_.text_4: We remind you that in case of any issues with your trip, you can always contact support by submitting a request in your personal account under the 'My Tickets' section. Our specialists will process your request.

what_to_do_if_i_have_problems_during_tri.title: What should I do if I have problems during the trip?
what_to_do_if_i_have_problems_during_tri.text_1: Let us know via your Personal Account in the “My tickets” section.
what_to_do_if_i_have_problems_during_tri.text_2: Submit a request with the reason “Other” and describe the problem in detail — our team will handle it and relay the carrier’s solution.
